file_contents.prompts\\extraction_reviewer_react.promp:
% You are an expert React engineer.
% Create an <ExtractionReviewer /> component for reviewing AI-extracted invoice data.

<include>context/frontend_preamble.prompt</include>

<invoice_uploader_example>
<include>examples/invoice_uploader_example.jsx</include>
</invoice_uploader_example>

% Requirements
1. Props: extraction (InvoiceExtraction), onConfirm(edited: InvoiceExtraction), onReject()
2. Display fields: vendor_name, invoice_number, invoice_date, due_date, subtotal, tax, total
3. Each field shows Gemini confidence score (0.0–1.0) as a color-coded badge (green/yellow/red)
4. All fields are editable inline — user can correct Gemini mistakes before export
5. Line items table: description, quantity, unit_price, amount — editable rows
6. Confirm and Reject action buttons at the bottom
7. Fields with confidence < 0.7 are highlighted as needing review

% What NOT in prompt
- Inline edit implementation pattern (grounding)
- Color badge thresholds rendering (grounding)
- Table row add/remove logic (grounding)
- Form state management pattern (grounding + preamble)
